languages.text: "Ни твоя жизнь, ни жизнь Нунциуса не принадлежат тебе. Они принадлежат Империуму. Твоя ересь попрала догмы и обрекла вас обоих, и твой долг — исправить содеянное. Лети на Амсанкт и прерви порочный круг".

"Nuncius's life does not belong to you. Neither does your own. They both belong to the Imperium. Your heresy has flouted dogma and doomed you both, and it is your duty to rectify what you have done. Go to Amsanct and break this vicious circle."
languages.original_text: "Ни твоя жизнь, ни жизнь Нунциуса не принадлежат тебе. Они принадлежат Империуму. Твоя ересь попрала догмы и обрекла вас обоих, и твой долг — исправить содеянное. Лети на Амсанкт и прерви порочный круг".

traits.locale_text: "Nuncius's life does not belong to you. Neither does your own. They both belong to the Imperium. Your heresy has flouted dogma and doomed you both, and it is your duty to rectify what you have done. Go to Amsanct and break this vicious circle."

"Nuncius's life does not belong to you. Neither does your own. They both belong to the Imperium. Your heresy has flouted dogma and doomed you both, and it is your duty to rectify what you have done. Go to Amsanct and break this vicious circle."

"Nuncius's life does not belong to you. Neither does your own. They both belong to the Imperium. Your heresy has flouted dogma and doomed you both, and it is your duty to rectify what you have done. Go to Amsanct and break this vicious circle."

languages.text: «La vida de Nuncius no le pertenece, ni la suya propia tampoco. Ambas son propiedad del Imperium. Su herejía contra el dogma les condena a ambos, y es su deber rectificar. Vaya a Amsanct y rompa este círculo vicioso».
languages.original_text: "Nuncius's life does not belong to you. Neither does your own. They both belong to the Imperium. Your heresy has flouted dogma and doomed you both, and it is your duty to rectify what you have done. Go to Amsanct and break this vicious circle."

traits.locale_text: «La vida de Nuncius no le pertenece, ni la suya propia tampoco. Ambas son propiedad del Imperium. Su herejía contra el dogma les condena a ambos, y es su deber rectificar. Vaya a Amsanct y rompa este círculo vicioso».

languages.text: “你与努恩修斯的生命皆不属于自己，而是属于帝国。你的异端行径违背了教条，将你们二人都推向了毁灭。纠正你当年的所作所为是你的职责。去阿姆桑克特，打破这个邪恶的循环吧。”
languages.original_text: "Nuncius's life does not belong to you. Neither does your own. They both belong to the Imperium. Your heresy has flouted dogma and doomed you both, and it is your duty to rectify what you have done. Go to Amsanct and break this vicious circle."

traits.locale_text: “你与努恩修斯的生命皆不属于自己，而是属于帝国。你的异端行径违背了教条，将你们二人都推向了毁灭。纠正你当年的所作所为是你的职责。去阿姆桑克特，打破这个邪恶的循环吧。”

languages.text: « La vie de Nuncius ne vous appartient pas, pas plus que la vôtre. Elles appartiennent à l'Imperium. Vous avez bafoué le dogme en commettant une hérésie qui vous a condamnés tous les deux, et il est de votre devoir de rectifier votre erreur. Le moment est venu de vous rendre sur Amsanct pour mettre un terme à ce cercle vicieux. »
languages.original_text: "Nuncius's life does not belong to you. Neither does your own. They both belong to the Imperium. Your heresy has flouted dogma and doomed you both, and it is your duty to rectify what you have done. Go to Amsanct and break this vicious circle."

traits.locale_text: « La vie de Nuncius ne vous appartient pas, pas plus que la vôtre. Elles appartiennent à l'Imperium. Vous avez bafoué le dogme en commettant une hérésie qui vous a condamnés tous les deux, et il est de votre devoir de rectifier votre erreur. Le moment est venu de vous rendre sur Amsanct pour mettre un terme à ce cercle vicieux. »

languages.text: "Nuncius'un hayatı sana ait değil. Kendi hayatın da öyle. İkisi de İmparatorluk'a ait. Kâfirliğin dogmayı hiçe sayıp ikinizi de mahkûm etti, yaptığını düzeltmekse vazifen. Amsanct'a git ve bu kısır döngüyü kır."
languages.original_text: "Nuncius's life does not belong to you. Neither does your own. They both belong to the Imperium. Your heresy has flouted dogma and doomed you both, and it is your duty to rectify what you have done. Go to Amsanct and break this vicious circle."

traits.locale_text: "Nuncius'un hayatı sana ait değil. Kendi hayatın da öyle. İkisi de İmparatorluk'a ait. Kâfirliğin dogmayı hiçe sayıp ikinizi de mahkûm etti, yaptığını düzeltmekse vazifen. Amsanct'a git ve bu kısır döngüyü kır."

languages.text: "Nuncius' Leben gehört nicht Euch. Genau wie Euer eigenes. Sie gehören beide dem Imperium. Eure Ketzerei hat das Dogma missachtet und Euch beide verdammt. Es ist Eure Pflicht, was Ihr getan habt zu berichtigen. Geht nach Amsanct und durchbrecht diesen grausamen Kreis."
languages.original_text: "Nuncius's life does not belong to you. Neither does your own. They both belong to the Imperium. Your heresy has flouted dogma and doomed you both, and it is your duty to rectify what you have done. Go to Amsanct and break this vicious circle."

traits.locale_text: "Nuncius' Leben gehört nicht Euch. Genau wie Euer eigenes. Sie gehören beide dem Imperium. Eure Ketzerei hat das Dogma missachtet und Euch beide verdammt. Es ist Eure Pflicht, was Ihr getan habt zu berichtigen. Geht nach Amsanct und durchbrecht diesen grausamen Kreis."

languages.text: 「ヌンキウスの命はあなたのものではない。あなた自身のものでもありません。どちらもインペリウムのものだ。あなた方の異端は教義に背き、あなた方二人を破滅させた。あなた方のしたことを正すのはあなた方の義務だ。アムサンクに行き、この悪循環を断ち切るのだ。」
languages.original_text: "Nuncius's life does not belong to you. Neither does your own. They both belong to the Imperium. Your heresy has flouted dogma and doomed you both, and it is your duty to rectify what you have done. Go to Amsanct and break this vicious circle."

traits.locale_text: 「ヌンキウスの命はあなたのものではない。あなた自身のものでもありません。どちらもインペリウムのものだ。あなた方の異端は教義に背き、あなた方二人を破滅させた。あなた方のしたことを正すのはあなた方の義務だ。アムサンクに行き、この悪循環を断ち切るのだ。」
